questions.a: Morning hyperglycemia due to normal early morning release of counter-regulatory hormones (GH, cortisol)

questions.q: ما هو الميكانيزم الدقيق لعمل المضاد الحيوي Vancomycin؟
questions.a: Inhibits cell wall peptidoglycan formation by binding to D-Ala-D-Ala portion of cell wall precursors

questions.q: ما هو الـ ECG finding المميز لحالات الـ Brugada syndrome؟
questions.a: Pseudo-Right Bundle Branch Block (RBBB) with ST-segment elevation in leads V1-V3
